name: python3-tornado
title: python3-tornado
summary: scalable, non-blocking web server and tools - Python 3 package
description:
scalable, non-blocking web server and tools - Python 3 package
Tornado is a Python web framework and asynchronous networking library,
originally developed at FriendFeed. By using non-blocking network I/O,
Tornado can scale to tens of thousands of open connections, making it ideal
for long polling, WebSockets, and other applications that require a
long-lived connection to each user.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
